top_findings.summary: The skill requests access to "mcp__serena__*" (wildcard all Serena tools) and "mcp__linear__*" (wildcard all Linear tools) without clear justification or scope limitation. While GitHub access is directly relevant for PR review, unrestricted access to all Serena and Linear tools (which could include sensitive project management data, user information, administrative functions) exceeds the stated purpose of "conducting PR reviews." The skill could achieve its context-aware review goal with more limited, specific permissions to read relevant issue/ticket data rather than blanket access to all tools.
